meaning: n.集会,召集,教士会议,(一些大学中的)毕业同学会
examples: They regretted agreeing to the convocation of that meeting.
We declared ourselves for the immediate convocation of the meeting.
In the first day shall be an holy convocation; ye shall do no manner of servile work therein.
The candidate disinvited Wright from giving the convocation when he announced his Presidential bid.
We therefore recommend the convocation of worldwide number-revaluation negotiations, to be held under United Nations auspices.
